contentBlocks.original:
शुभं करोति कल्याणमारोग्यं धनसंपदा
शत्रुबुद्धिविनाशाय दीपज्योतिर्नमोऽस्तुते
contentBlocks.transliteration:
śubhaṃ karoti kalyāṇamārogyaṃ dhanasaṃpadā
śatrubuddhivināśāya dīpajyotirnamo'stute
contentBlocks.translation: Salutations to the light of the lamp, which brings auspiciousness, prosperity, good health, abundance of wealth, and the destruction of the intellect’s enemy (ignorance).
contentBlocks.meanings: शुभं (śubhaṃ) – auspiciousness; करोति (karoti) – does; कल्याणम् (kalyāṇam) – prosperity; आरोग्यम् (ārogyam) – good health; धनसंपदा (dhanasaṃpadā) – abundance of wealth (dhana:wealth | saṃpadā:abundance); शत्रुबुद्धिविनाशाय (śatrubuddhivināśāya) – for destruction of intellect's enemy (śatru:enemy | buddhi:intellect | vināśāya:for destruction); दीपज्योतिः (dīpajyotiḥ) – light of the lamp (dīpa:lamp | jyotiḥ:light); नमः (namaḥ) – salutations; अस्तु (astu) – let it be; ते (te) – to you;

contentBlocks.original:
दीपज्योतिः परब्रह्म दीपज्योतिर्जनार्दनः ।
दीपो हरतु मे पापं दीपज्योतिर्नमोऽस्तुते ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
dīpajyotiḥ parabrahma dīpajyotirjanārdanaḥ .
dīpo haratu me pāpaṃ dīpajyotirnamo'stute ..
contentBlocks.translation: Deepa-Jyothi is the supreme Brahman, Deepa-Jyothi is Janardhana. May the divine lamp eradicate my sins. Salutations to the divine lamp of the evening.
contentBlocks.meanings: दीपज्योतिः (dīpajyotiḥ) – light of the lamp (dīpa:lamp | jyotiḥ:light); परब्रह्म (parabrahma) – supreme Brahman (para:supreme | brahma:Brahman); दीपज्योतिः (dīpajyotiḥ) – light of the lamp (dīpa:lamp | jyotiḥ:light); जनार्दनः (janārdanaḥ) – Janardana; दीपः (dīpaḥ) – lamp; हरतु (haratu) – may remove; मे (me) – my; पापं (pāpaṃ) – sins; दीपज्योतिः (dīpajyotiḥ) – light of the lamp (dīpa:lamp | jyotiḥ:light); नमः (namaḥ) – salutations; अस्तु (astu) – may it be; ते (te) – to you;
